prerequisites: An active OnceHub account with access to the Account Integrations settings (sign up at oncehub.com if you do not have one).
An OnceHub API key generated from Account Integrations > APIs & Webhooks (the key is shown only once at creation, so copy it immediately).
A start date (start_date) to define the earliest point from which to sync data.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: OnceHub authenticates every request with an API key sent in the API-Key HTTP header over HTTPS. Provide this key in the connector's required api_key field. Create the key in account settings under Account Integrations > APIs & Webhooks by clicking Create API key, naming it, and generating it; it is displayed only once.

setupSteps.title: Create an API key in OnceHub
setupSteps.body: Sign in to OnceHub, open account settings via the gear icon in the top-right corner, and go to Account Integrations > APIs & Webhooks. In the API Keys section click Create API key, enter a descriptive name, then click Generate key and copy the key immediately because it is shown only once.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it in the API-Key header on each request to the OnceHub API.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Enter a value for the required start_date field. The connector uses this as the earliest date from which to retrieve OnceHub data during sync.

sources.title: Overview / Getting Started - OnceHub Developer Center
